---
title: "Aaron Sams"
subtitle: "Part-time Programmer"
image: /images/portraits/placeholder.svg
role: alumni
sort_key: 2025
details: "Part-time Programmer 2024–2025"
aliases: ["Aaron Sams", "A Sams", "A. Coles"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:as2847@cornell.edu"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/ajsams"
---
